frame_analyses.description: Loop material visible on workspace, still in packaging/introduction state. Grasper approaching loop apparatus.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initial setup phase, loop intact and ready for deployment.

frame_analyses.description: Loop deployed and visible, grasper has taken control of the loop. Loop opening mechanism being manipulated.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop appears to be opening cleanly; good instrument control.

frame_analyses.description: Loop is now open and being guided toward the brown foam tissue model. Grasper in left hand positioning loop.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop oriented appropriately; second hand preparing to assist with positioning.

frame_analyses.description: Loop is being maneuvered around the tissue. Both hands visible controlling loop deployment.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth two-handed coordination. Loop appears centered on target appendage.

frame_analyses.description: Loop fully deployed and positioned around appendage. Grasper beginning to manipulate pusher assembly.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop placement appears to be at or very near the marked target site on appendage.

frame_analyses.description: Pusher being manipulated; appears to be at scored break line. Advancement beginning.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Pusher break point positioned correctly outside trainer field.

frame_analyses.description: Pusher fully advanced; loop knot being tightened on appendage base. Visible cinching action.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot advancement appears smooth and controlled. Loop securing on marked area.

frame_analyses.description: Loop knot fully secured at target mark. Pusher in advanced position confirming loop security.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot appears tightly seated on appendage at marked location. Good final positioning.

frame_analyses.description: Scissors being positioned to cut the loop tail material. Tail visible extending from appendage.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Scissors approaching tail at appropriate angle for clean cut.

frame_analyses.description: Scissors actively cutting loop tail inside trainer field.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean cutting motion; tail being severed while loop remains secured.

frame_analyses.description: Loop tail has been cut. Final state shows loop knot secured tightly on appendage at marked location.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completion apparent. Loop remains fully secured and positioned correctly.

penalties.description: Loop positioned at marked target site, knot secured tightly, no deviation observed, tail cut inside trainer, appendage intact.

loop_placement.visual_evidence: Loop knot positioned at visible marked line on appendage base throughout frames 12-26

pusher_break_procedure.notes: Pusher broken at scored mark and advanced cleanly without resistance

confidence_rationale: Excellent video clarity throughout all phases. Loop placement, knot security, and tail cut all clearly visible. Task completion unambiguous. Timing is verifiable from frame sequence. Minor confidence reduction only because final knot position is viewed from angle that makes sub-millimeter mark deviation difficult to rule out completely, but visual evidence strongly suggests perfect positioning.
technique_summary: Exemplary expert-level performance. Completed endoloop task in 26 seconds, nearly half the proficiency benchmark of 53 seconds. Demonstrated smooth two-handed coordination, precise loop deployment, proper pusher break and advancement technique, and clean tail cut. Loop remained secured throughout with no slippage or deviation from target mark. No tissue damage to foam appendage. Performance indicates advanced laparoscopic skills and comprehensive understanding of ligating loop mechanics.
strengths: Exceptionally rapid task completion (26s vs 53s benchmark)
Precise loop placement at marked target site with zero apparent deviation
Smooth, controlled two-handed loop manipulation without hesitation
Clean pusher break at scored line and smooth advancement without resistance
Tight, secure knot cinching with visible confirmation of appendage base engagement
Efficient tail cutting with loop remaining fully secured post-cut
No excessive tissue handling or apparatus manipulation
Professional instrument control throughout all phases
